headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund's Serhou Guirassy and Karim Adeyemi scored second-half goals to secure a 2-0 win over St Pauli in the Bundesliga on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Guirassy and Adeyemi lift Dortmund to 2-0 win at St Pauli

video.headline: Karim Adeyemi doubles Dortmund's lead on the counterattack

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Karim Adeyemi slots in the goal for Borussia Dortmund) 2025/03/01 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen delivered a ruthless first-half performance, striking three times in just seven minutes, to leave hosts Eintracht Frankfurt reeling with a 4-1 victory in the Bundesliga on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen's first-half blitz sees off Frankfurt

video.headline: Aleix García with a Spectacular Goal vs. Eintracht Frankfurt

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Aleix García with a Spectacular Goal vs. Eintracht Frankfurt) 2025/03/01 ESHEET
